description: Deepen iter12: ON TOP OF iter10 (top10 + n_est=5000 KEPT), change BLEND ratio 0.3 -> 0.4 for sub-model contribution. v4 ablate showed sub-models contribute marginally (+285 when dropped); raising blend weight tests whether more sub-model influence helps now that there are 10 sub-models (vs v4's top 5). Single knob.
